Uniti Group Inc. reveals pricing for increased senior notes issuance.

data.title: J. Mattingly 1845 Distillery offers custom whiskey for Halloween - personalizing the bottle for partygoers.
data.description: Get ready to impress at Halloween parties with a customized bottle from J. Mattingly 1845 Distillery in Frankfort, Kentucky. With the craft your bottle program launching on September 25, 2025, whiskey enthusiasts can personalize their own bottles for the spooky season. This unique offering allows customers to go online and create a one-of-a-kind Halloween-themed bottle. Perfect for standing out at gatherings, this initiative showcases the creativity and personal touch that J. Mattingly 1845 Distillery is known for. Don't miss out on this opportunity to add a special touch to your celebrations this Halloween.

data.title: South Park parodies prediction markets, bets included on Trump-Satan baby's gender in latest episode.
data.description: One of the bets made in the animated series involved guessing the gender of the fictional baby formed by Donald Trump and Satan.

data.title: Price forecast for ARB aims for $0.42-0.44 range, with support near $0.40 indicating possible rebound in 2 weeks.
data.description: Arbitrum (ARB) is expected to see a price increase in the coming weeks, with predictions indicating a target recovery range of $0.42 to $0.44. This rebound is likely as Arbitrum has bounced back from oversold levels near the $0.40 support area. Investors can anticipate a potential gain of approximately 5-10% in value within the next two weeks based on current market trends.

data.title: Kuke Music Holding (NYSE: KUKE) acquires controlling interest in Naxos Music Group, a major classical music company.
data.description: On September 25, 2025, Kuke Music Holding Limited (NYSE: KUKE), a prominent classical music services platform in China, revealed its acquisition of a majority stake in Naxos Music Group, a global giant in independent classical music. This significant move consolidates Kuke’s position in the industry and sets the stage for substantial growth and influence.

data.title: WindShape opens first US facility at Osage Nation's Skyway Range in Tulsa, making the city the Drone Capital.
data.description: A new facility by Swiss company WindShape, Inc. has officially opened in Tulsa, Oklahoma, marking their first location in the US. This expansion solidifies Tulsa as the hub for drone technology globally. The facility is located at Osage Nation's Skyway Range, positioning the city to lead innovation in this sector.

data.title: U.S. Commerce Dept. finds Mexican, Thai, Vietnamese chassis sold below fair value in U.S. - preliminary antidumping duty determination.
data.description: On September 25, 2025, the U.S. Department of Commerce revealed its initial discovery that manufacturers of chassis in Mexico, Thailand, and Vietnam have been selling their products at prices below fair value in the American market. The investigation by Commerce determined that the chassis and chassis subassemblies from these countries were being sold at amounts that do not align with fair pricing standards. The precise figures regarding the extent of undervalued pricing and the impact on the U.S. market have not yet been disclosed.

data.title: Cloudflare to launch 'NET Dollar' stablecoin for AI-driven payments, aiming to empower global users.
data.description: Cloudflare has announced the launch of NET Dollar, a new initiative designed to facilitate immediate payments for artificial intelligence agents, creators, and developers on a global scale. The program is tailored to support fast and efficient transactions within this community.

data.title: Black Hills Corp. sets $450 million debt offering for 4.550% senior notes due Jan. 31, 2031, expected to close on Oct. 2.
data.description: In Rapid City, South Dakota on September 25, 2025, Black Hills Corp. unveiled details of a registered public debt offering, consisting of $450 million in 4.550% senior unsecured notes set to mature on January 31, 2031. The offering is slated to conclude on October 2, 2025, pending standard closing requirements. The company, listed on the NYSE as BKH, revealed this development without disclosing the specific source of the news.

data.title: Price prediction: APT may hit $3.64 in 7 days due to weakening support. Oversold conditions may offer bounce near $3.92.
data.description: A prediction for the price of APT indicates a bearish trend with a target of $3.64 in the short term. Technical analysis suggests that the market is oversold, potentially leading to a bounce opportunity around the support level of $3.92.

data.title: KuCoin appeals against a $14 million anti-money laundering penalty in Canada, the highest recorded for a crypto exchange.
data.description: KuCoin has lodged an appeal following a $14 million fine for breaching anti-money laundering rules imposed by a Canadian financial regulator.

data.title: Endeavour Silver Corp reports high-grade silver-lead-zinc mineralization at Kolpa Mine in Peru. Positive results from ongoing exploration program.
data.description: Endeavour Silver Corp. has recently disclosed promising drill findings from its exploration initiative at Kolpa Mine in Peru's Huancavelica province. The region features sub-vertical geological formations resulting from compressive forces linked to the Andean Orogeny. These forces have given rise to extensive vein networks aligning southwest to northeast, crucial for mineralization guidance. The company, listed on TSX as EDR and NYSE as EXK, is thrilled with the progress at the site.

data.title: Global tech manufacturer chooses Kneat for digital transformation, signs Master Services Agreement. (chars: 86)
data.description: In LIMERICK, Ireland, as of September 25, 2025, kneat.com, inc. (TSX: KSI) (OTCQC: KSIOF), a notable figure in the digitalization and automation of validation and quality procedures, has disclosed the signing of a lucrative Master Services Agreement with a renowned multinational manufacturer. The manufacturer specializes in producing sophisticated devices and components for various sectors such as industrial, consumer goods, and MedTech. The collaboration marks a significant milestone for Kneat and reflects the growing recognition of their expertise in this field.

data.title: Kura Oncology and Kyowa Kirin report success in testing ziftomenib for NPM1-mutated AML in a recent publication.
data.description: A clinical trial named KOMET-001 focusing on patients with relapsed or refractory acute myeloid leukemia (AML) carrying a mutation in the NPM1 gene has succeeded in achieving its main objective. The trial used ziftomenib as a sole treatment, showing notable clinical advantages and notable reductions in disease severity.

data.title: Meijer donates $500,000 for a new food marketing hub at Western Michigan University's Haworth College of Business.
data.description: In Kalamazoo, Michigan on September 25, 2025, Meijer revealed a generous contribution of $500,000 to Western Michigan University's Haworth College of Business Food Marketing Program. This substantial donation aims to boost the establishment of a cutting-edge food marketing hub. The initiative is designed to assist students involved in the program in enhancing their skills and knowledge in the field of food marketing.

data.title: Stellar's price forecast aims for $0.47 recovery amid bearish trend, with $0.34 crucial support for Q4 2025 prediction.
data.description: The price forecast for XLM indicates a potential resistance test at $0.47 in the next 4-6 weeks, even amidst the current bearish trend. The crucial support level at $0.34 will play a significant role in determining the trajectory for the fourth quarter of 2025.

Macron: ‘I have just spoken with Danish Prime Minister Mette Frederiksen. I expressed France's full solidarity with Denmark following repeated intrusions by unidentified drones affecting operations at Copenhagen
